description: Read and write a self-hosted WordPress + WooCommerce site over REST. Commands: 'wp_request' (raw passthrough to any /wp-json/* path) plus typed wrappers for posts (list/get/create/update/delete_post), products (list/get/create/update/delete_product), orders (list/get/update_order), and customers (list_customers). Every command takes a 'site_url' (your site host, e.g. 'mystore.com') that MUST match the host baked into 'allowlist' below at install. WordPress-core routes (/wp-json/wp/) authenticate with an Application Password (Basic, secret 'wp_app_password', username baked below); WooCommerce routes (/wp-json/wc/) authenticate with 'woo_consumer_key'/'woo_consumer_secret' sent as query params. The host injects all credentials; the tool never sees them. Requires HTTPS and pretty permalinks. INSTALL EDIT REQUIRED: replace YOUR_WP_HOST (2 places: allowlist.host and each host_patterns) and YOUR_WP_USERNAME (the Basic username) before installing.

auth.instructions:
You are about to store WordPress / WooCommerce secrets. Enter only the ones you need and leave the rest blank:

- wp_app_password: a WordPress Application Password (WordPress admin -> Users -> Profile -> Application Passwords). Needed for WordPress-core routes (/wp-json/wp).
- woo_consumer_key and woo_consumer_secret: a WooCommerce REST API key (WooCommerce -> Settings -> Advanced -> REST API -> Add key, Read/Write). Needed for WooCommerce routes (/wp-json/wc).

Before this step you should have run 'python3 configure.py --host YOUR_HOST --user YOUR_WP_LOGIN' to bake your site host and WordPress username into the tool (re-run any time to change them). Your site must serve REST over HTTPS with pretty permalinks (/wp-json/). When calling the tool, pass site_url equal to that host.

required_secrets.name: wp_app_password
required_secrets.prompt: WordPress Application Password (Users -> Profile -> Application Passwords) - optional, skip if WooCommerce-only

required_secrets.name: woo_consumer_key
required_secrets.prompt: WooCommerce consumer key (ck_...) - optional, skip if WordPress-only

required_secrets.name: woo_consumer_secret
required_secrets.prompt: WooCommerce consumer secret (cs_...) - optional, skip if WordPress-only
